aliases: The Entertainment Capital of the World
The Gambling Capital of the World
description: seat of Clark County, and largest city in state of Nevada, United States
description_wiki: Las Vegas, colloquially referred to as Vegas, is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Nevada and the seat of Clark County.
The National Basketball Association (NBA) is a professional basketball league in North America composed of 30 teams (29 in the United States and 1 in Canada).

description: independent city in Missouri, United States

description_wiki: Cable News Network (CNN) is an American multinational  news media company and the flagship namesake property of CNN Worldwide, a division of Warner Bros.

description: American basic cable and satellite business news television channel
description_wiki: The Consumer News and Business Channel (CNBC) is an American business news channel owned by Versant.

The global COVID-19 pandemic (also known as the coronavirus pandemic), caused by severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2), began with an outbreak in Wuhan, China, in December 2019.

2020 (MMXX) was a leap year starting on Wednesday of the Gregorian calendar, the 2020th year of the Common Era (CE) and Anno Domini (AD) designations, the 20th  year of the 3rd millennium and the 21st century, and the  1st   year of the 2020s decade.

2021 (MMXXI) was a common year starting on Friday of the Gregorian calendar, the 2021st year of the Common Era (CE) and Anno Domini (AD) designations, the 21st  year of the 3rd millennium and the 21st century, and the  2nd   year of the 2020s decade.

2022 (MMXXII) was a common year starting on Saturday of the Gregorian calendar, the 2022nd year of the Common Era (CE) and Anno Domini (AD) designations, the 22nd  year of the 3rd millennium and the 21st century, and the  3rd   year of the 2020s decade.
